candidate_definition_hints.text: [CVPR 2021 - Official] Rigid Subset Mix (RSMix): Regularization Strategy for Point Cloud via Rigidly Mixed Samples
We propose a novel data augmentation method for point cloud, **Rigid Subset Mix (RSMix)**.
